keySettings.hint: Esc to reset default, Backspace to unassign.
help.key.help: Toggle help for the current panel
help.nav.scroll: Scroll wheel on nav bar to switch panels
help.account.info: View or edit your profile card
help.account.avatar: Upload and crop a new avatar; needs approval
help.keybind.inspect: Set the toggle key for game debug details
help.keybind.hint: Esc to restore default key, Backspace to unassign
help.password.old: Enter current password to verify identity
help.password.new: Enter new password (min 6 chars) and confirm
help.password.submit: After submission, you will be redirected to log in again
help.crop.move: Drag to move, scroll to zoom; 1:1 crop
help.crop.confirm: Crop to 512x512 and upload; needs approval
help.announce.card: Card with title, date, and changes
help.term.dynamic: Tags highlight on hover; double-click to jump
help.skill.copy: Hold Ctrl and hover a skill row to copy
help.skill.dynamic: Tags highlight on hover; double-click to jump
help.card.dynamic: Names colored by type; tags hover-highlight and jump
help.character.lore: Hover skill name for lore tooltip
help.character.dynamic: Tags highlight on hover; double-click to jump
help.draft.input: Write HTML; live preview with auto-save and tag replacement
help.editor.palette: Search and insert tokens or snippets by Chinese, pinyin, or initials
help.editor.insert: Click to insert as a child of the selection; with no selection, append to the tree root
help.editor.dragInsert: Drag onto the top, bottom, or middle of a node to insert before, after, or as child
help.editor.variant: Hold the variant shortcut, then click or drag a variant-marked snippet to insert its second structure
help.editor.editInline: Click a selected tree node again, or double-click it, to edit the tag inline
help.editor.recommendationMode: Related items can switch directed or bidirectional relations, with results logged
help.editor.graphSearch: Search and locate tokens or snippets in the graph
help.editor.graphMode: Click the relation type button to cycle combined, nested, or adjacent links
help.editor.graphLinks: Shown links filters drawn lines by percentage: 10% minimum, 100% for all links; it does not change zoom or node count
help.editor.graphNavigate: Drag to pan and scroll to zoom; fit graph scales to the node bounds
help.editor.graphNode: Click a node to inspect related items; click a detail row to jump again
help.editor.io: Input from the draft box into the tree, or output back to the draft box
help.editor.move: Drag tree nodes to change nesting or sibling order
help.editor.key.addChild: Add a child node to the selection
help.editor.key.addSibling: Add a sibling node after the selection
help.editor.key.undoRedo: Undo or redo structure tree changes
help.tokens.inlineEdit: Click a value to edit inline; color has picker
help.tokens.go: Jump to definition in its panel
help.tokens.logOps: Copy, delete, or clear log entries
help.perm.logFilter: Filter logs by type, result, and date
help.game.setupCharacters: Choose a character for each seat
help.game.setupMode: Sandbox = manual; Auto = flow; online locks sandbox
help.game.onlineCreate: Enter room name to create; Enter for quick create
help.game.onlineList: Refresh rooms and see status tags
help.game.onlineEnter: Join, or re-enter your current room
help.game.onlineBack: Return to lobby without leaving room
help.game.onlineDissolve: Host can dissolve rooms from the list
help.game.onlineMembers: Shows host, you, and spectator state
help.game.onlineActions: Toggle spectating if allowed, or leave
help.game.drag: Drag cards between areas; sort within one area
help.game.dragToSummary: Drop onto a summary to place into that hand
help.game.dragSummaryJudge: Hold until Judge Area appears, then drop
help.game.summaryJudge: Long-press about 0.4s to open judge area
help.game.areaButtons: Open judge area or equipment area
help.game.pileViewer: Click to open deck or discard viewer
help.game.viewerWindow: Drag window; edge-scroll; Esc or blank closes
help.game.equipViewer: Four equipment slots; drag cards to a slot
help.game.cardContext: Quick-place to piles, treatment, or role areas
help.game.roleContext: Switch view, set turn role, or adjust health
help.game.viewerBadges: Labels show who is viewing or spectating
help.game.inspect: Press the inspect key once to enable debug mode; hover to switch targets, click a target to pin it, then move to the floating window to scroll; press the key again to unpin or close

game.inspector.hint: Hover to switch targets; click a target to pin it, then move to the floating window to scroll; press the key again to unpin or close
